data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for separate policies for different roles.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for separate policies for different roles (drivers, warehouse, office). However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for separate policies, but there is no supporting evidence to demonstrate that this requirement is implemented or operational, leading to an inconclusive validation.
gaps: No evidence of separate policies for different roles.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement for separate policies.
